title: Reconcile Meshtastic compatibility target architecture
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN has Python and Rust Meshtastic compatibility prototypes plus docs, while the active MVP Beads require a Zephyr-side firmware adapter. Current local schemas and transports do not cleanly map to Zephyr C/nanopb, Rust/FFI, or a host-side bridge. What needs to be done: decide and document whether the MVP implementation target is Zephyr C/nanopb, Rust generated code behind an FFI boundary, a host/client bridge, or a staged combination; update dependencies and docs accordingly. Acceptance criteria: selected architecture is recorded in Beads notes/design; implementation Beads point to the selected code path; docs no longer claim native Zephyr is unsupported if Zephyr remains the MVP target; unsupported paths are explicitly deferred.
